name: ASUS TUF Gaming GeForce RTX™ 5090 32GB Graphics Card
description: ASUS TUF Gaming GeForce RTX™ 5090 32GB Graphics Card What is ASUS TUF Gaming GeForce RTX 5090 32GB Graphics Card price in Pakistan? ASUS TUF Gaming GeForce RTX™ 5090 32GB Graphics Card price in Pakistan is Rs.1,100,000. It features 21760 CUDA cores with boost clock up to 2437 MHz and massive 32GB GDDR7 memory on a 512-bit interface for extreme 4K and 8K gaming. Built on PCIe 5.0, it delivers up to 3352 TOPs AI performance and supports HDMI 2.1b and DisplayPort 2.1b outputs for next-gen displays.
